# Luiza Corpaci

AI engineer at AMD, completing a Master's in Data Science, applying to PhD programs. Research at the intersection of formal verification, interpretability, collective intelligence, category theory, and AI safety.

## Start here
- /research/
- /blog/

## Core topics
- Limits to formalization: syntax-semantics interface, incompleteness, what formalisms cannot reach
- Interpretability and grounding: what measurement reveals and conceals about neural networks
- Collective intelligence: value alignment at the human level, active inference, epistemic coordination
- Social bias measurement: geometric approaches, midpoint geometry, SONAR embeddings
- AI safety: feature invariance, reliable interpretability, formal tools for deployment guarantees
- Category theory: structure-preserving maps, functors, applications to learning and meaning


## Projects
- /projects/ictss-playground.md

## Writing
- /blog/
